nasb.text: and said, “Truly I say to you, unless you are converted and become like children, you will not enter the kingdom of heaven.

esv.text: and said, “Truly, I say to you, unless you turn and become like children, you will never enter the kingdom of heaven.

cnv.text: “我實在告訴你們，如果你們不回轉，變成像小孩子一樣，一定不能進天國。

ccb.text: “我实在告诉你们，你们若不变得像小孩子那样，绝不能进天国。

csbs.text: 说：“我确实地告诉你们：你们如果不回转，变得像小孩子一样，绝不能进入天国。
